claims.evidence_text: The N application rate (kgha-1 yr-1) showed a curvilinear time trend, with 50-year averages of 80, 71, and 52 in maize, rice, and wheat, respectively
claims.claim_summary: Global 50-year average N fertilizer application rate for wheat was 52 kg/ha/yr.

claims.evidence_text: The REN of the three cereals was 56% for maize, 36% for rice, and 48% for wheat.
claims.claim_summary: Fertilizer-N recovery efficiency (REN) for wheat is 48% (researchers' trials; ~25% lower in farmers' fields).

claims.evidence_text: The contributions of seed to maize, rice, and wheat were based on the seed rate of 25, 20, and 80kgha-1 yr-1, respectively, commonly used for these crops
claims.claim_summary: Common wheat seed rate of 80 kg/ha/yr used globally.
